title: PSA result review

examination.text: Supports symptom and medicine history, abdominal and genital examination, digital rectal examination, frequency-volume context, urinalysis, qualified PSA discussion, qualified creatinine, conservative-advice documentation, and referral criteria.
examination.rationale: Supports qualified PSA discussion and adult male LUTS assessment context for PSA result review; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports symptom and medicine history, abdominal and genital examination, digital rectal examination, frequency-volume context, urinalysis, qualified PSA discussion, qualified creatinine, conservative-advice documentation, and referral criteria.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.

Age, indication, result date and value, laboratory range, prior trend, infection, instrumentation, prostate examination, family history, risk interpretation, repeat testing, referral and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for PSA result review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
